meta.certificationName: Google Cloud Professional Machine Learning Engineer
meta.title: GCP-MLE-1: Vertex AI Pipelines, Serving and Responsible AI

questions.stem: A team needs to **manage reusable online and offline ML features**. Which service or feature is the best fit?
questions.explanation:
**A** is correct because it is the managed Vertex AI feature repository for training and online serving use cases

**B** is incorrect because it is not the managed Vertex AI service for end-to-end pipeline orchestration

**C** is incorrect because it is not the Vertex AI feature intended for deployed-model drift monitoring

**D** is incorrect because they are not the Vertex AI option for large offline scoring jobs

[Vertex AI Feature Store overview](https://cloud.google.com/vertex-ai/docs/featurestore/latest/overview)

questions.stem:
Which service or feature is most directly associated with the following need?

- Goal: manage reusable online and offline ML features
- Constraint: use the managed vendor capability when possible

What should the team choose?
questions.explanation:
**B** is correct because it is the managed Vertex AI feature repository for training and online serving use cases

**A** is incorrect because they are not the Vertex AI option for large offline scoring jobs

**C** is incorrect because it is not the Vertex AI feature intended for deployed-model drift monitoring

**D** is incorrect because it is not the managed Vertex AI service for end-to-end pipeline orchestration

[Vertex AI Feature Store overview](https://cloud.google.com/vertex-ai/docs/featurestore/latest/overview)

questions.stem: A team needs to **provide managed notebooks for exploration and prototyping**. Which service or feature is the best fit?
questions.explanation:
**C** is correct because it provides managed notebook environments integrated with Vertex AI workflows

**A** is incorrect because it is not the Vertex AI feature intended for deployed-model drift monitoring

**B** is incorrect because they are not the managed online serving path for synchronous predictions

**D** is incorrect because it is not the more managed Vertex AI model-building option for supported data types

questions.stem: A team needs to **orchestrate repeatable end-to-end ML pipelines**. Which service or feature is the best fit?
questions.explanation:
**A** is correct because it is the managed orchestration layer for repeatable Vertex AI ML workflows

**B** is incorrect because it is not the Vertex AI capability for tracking artifacts and lineage across ML runs

**C** is incorrect because it is not the primary managed notebook environment for Vertex AI exploration work

**D** is incorrect because it is not the managed Vertex AI option for custom-code training workloads
